narratives.name: AI Infrastructure Buildout
narratives.thesis: Demand for AI chips and related infrastructure continues to drive strong earnings and positive outlooks for key semiconductor players and hardware providers.
watchFor: Hyperscaler capex cuts at next earnings
NVDA revenue growth slows below 20% QoQ
China export controls expand to HBM

narratives.name: GLP-1 Obesity Wave
narratives.thesis: Demand for GLP-1 obesity and diabetes drugs continues to fuel strong growth and positive outlooks for pharmaceutical companies leading in this space.
watchFor: New clinical trial data shows unexpected side effects for GLP-1 drugs
Increased competition or generic alternatives erode pricing power
Payer coverage for GLP-1 drugs becomes more restrictive

sources.title: Eli Lilly (LLY) Sees Strong Growth Driven by Mounjaro Momentum and GLP-1 Demand, Barclays Remains Bullish

narratives.name: AI Software & Cloud Adoption
narratives.thesis: Enterprises are increasingly adopting AI-powered software and cloud solutions, driving growth for companies providing these services and platforms.
watchFor: Major cloud providers report decelerating AI revenue growth
Enterprise software spending surveys turn negative
Microsoft or Oracle guide conservatively on AI software adoption

narratives.name: Credit Services Strength
narratives.thesis: Credit card companies and financial service providers are showing strong profitability and positive analyst sentiment, driven by robust consumer spending and strategic partnerships.

Credit card delinquency rates rise unexpectedly
Increased regulatory scrutiny on payment processors

narratives.name: Digital Ad & Content Dominance
narratives.thesis: Digital advertising and streaming content platforms continue to attract users and ad spend, driving growth for market leaders.
watchFor: Major advertisers cut digital ad budgets
Streaming subscriber growth plateaus or declines for market leaders
New regulatory hurdles impact content distribution or ad targeting

narratives.name: Heavy Machinery Agricultural Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Farmers continue to face challenges, leading to reduced demand for heavy agricultural machinery and impacting manufacturers.

Government subsidies for farmers increase
DE reports stronger-than-expected order book or guidance

sources.title: Deere Shares Tumble With Farmers Facing ‘Ongoing Challenges’

narratives.name: Semiconductor Equipment Expansion
narratives.thesis: Increased demand for advanced packaging and chip manufacturing capacity is benefiting semiconductor equipment and materials suppliers.
watchFor: Major foundries (TSM, Samsung) announce capex cuts
Geopolitical tensions disrupt global supply chains for equipment
Chip demand cools, leading to overcapacity concerns

narratives.name: Banks - Diversified AI Adoption
narratives.thesis: Diversified banks are benefiting from improving net interest margins and strategic financial maneuvers, with some exploring AI integration to enhance operations.
watchFor: Federal Reserve signals unexpected rate cuts, compressing NIMs
Significant increase in corporate or consumer loan defaults
New regulatory pressures on bank capital requirements

narratives.name: Aerospace & Defense Spending
narratives.thesis: Geopolitical tensions continue to drive increased defense spending, benefiting aerospace and defense contractors.

Significant cuts to US defense budget
GD reports weaker-than-expected order backlog

narratives.name: E-commerce Resilience
narratives.thesis: Despite broader economic concerns, key e-commerce players are showing resilience, driven by AI integration and strategic partnerships.
watchFor: Consumer spending data shows significant slowdown in online retail

Increased regulatory scrutiny on large e-commerce platforms

narratives.name: Healthcare Plans Stability
narratives.thesis: Managed care providers are demonstrating stable growth, outperforming the broader economy, indicating resilience in the healthcare insurance sector.
watchFor: Unexpected increases in medical costs or utilization rates
New government regulations impact profitability of managed care plans
UNH reports lower-than-expected membership growth

sources.title: UnitedHealth Group (UNH) Gains as Managed Care Outgrows Economy

narratives.name: Specialty Retail Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Rising fuel costs and inflationary pressures are impacting consumer spending, leading to weaker guidance for some specialty retailers.
watchFor: WMT or other major retailers report better-than-expected guidance
CPI data shows significant deceleration in energy prices
Consumer discretionary spending rebounds strongly

sources.title: Walmart Stock Falls As Dow Giant Guides Low Amid High Gas Prices

narratives.name: Rare Earths Rally
narratives.thesis: Rare earth stocks are seeing a rally driven by news of potential U.S. funding and a reduction in fears regarding China's market control.
watchFor: US funding initiatives for rare earths fail to materialize
China implements new export controls or increases production
Global demand for critical minerals softens

sources.title: Rare Earth Stocks Rally On Funding News, Fading China Fears
Rare Earth Stocks Rebound Because U.S.-China Summit Changed Little — Again

narratives.name: Quantum Computing Investment Wave
narratives.thesis: Government and private sector investment in quantum computing is accelerating, providing a significant tailwind for companies in this nascent but high-potential field.
watchFor: Government funding for quantum computing projects is cut
Major tech companies scale back quantum R&D
Technical breakthroughs fail to materialize, pushing timelines further out

sources.title: Quantum stocks soar as the Trump administration looks to be buying in

narratives.name: Logistics Efficiency & AI
narratives.thesis: Companies are investing in AI and operational efficiencies to improve logistics and supply chain management, creating opportunities for those leveraging technology.
watchFor: FDX reports significant cost savings from AI/efficiency initiatives
Broader adoption of AI in logistics sector accelerates
Economic slowdown impacts freight volumes more than expected

sources.title: FedEx (FDX) Gained From Strong Execution in Q1

narratives.name: Social Media Restructuring
narratives.thesis: Social media companies are facing legal challenges and internal restructuring, leading to uncertainty and potential headwinds.
watchFor: META reports better-than-expected user growth or ad revenue
Legal settlements are less costly than anticipated
Successful product launches reinvigorate user engagement

narratives.name: Logistics Operational Headwinds
narratives.thesis: Logistics companies are facing operational challenges, including potential engine failures and broader economic slowdowns, impacting their efficiency and profitability.
watchFor: Global trade volumes rebound sharply
Fuel prices decrease significantly
UPS reports successful implementation of cost-saving measures

narratives.name: Discount Stores Stability
narratives.thesis: Discount retailers continue to offer value to consumers, maintaining stable performance even amidst broader economic shifts.

Increased competition from online retailers

narratives.name: Inflation & Geopolitical Hedge (Silver)

Geopolitical tensions de-escalate, reducing demand for hedges

Technology.thesis: The AI capex cycle continues to be the dominant driver, with strong demand for chips, infrastructure, and AI-enabled software. Despite some mixed signals on specific names, the overall sector remains robust, fueled by significant investments and strategic partnerships.
watchFor: Mag 7 hyperscaler capex guide DOWN at next earnings — would crack the AI demand thesis
Hot core CPI print > 0.4% MoM — forces a hawkish Fed repricing, hurting growth multiples
China export controls expand to HBM or advanced AI accelerators — creates supply chain disruption

Consumer Cyclical.thesis: Consumer discretionary spending shows resilience in some areas like luxury and digital services, but broader retail is facing headwinds from inflation and higher gas prices, impacting lower-to-middle income consumers.
watchFor: Retail sales data shows significant deceleration (<0.2% MoM)
Consumer confidence index drops sharply (below 95)
Further sustained rise in gasoline prices (> $4.50/gallon national average)

Communication Services.thesis: While digital advertising and content platforms are showing strength, social media companies face ongoing regulatory and legal challenges, creating a bifurcated outlook for the sector.
watchFor: Major social media companies face new federal legislation on user safety
Digital advertising spending reports show significant deceleration
Netflix subscriber growth disappoints significantly

Industrials.thesis: Aerospace & Defense continues to benefit from geopolitical tensions, while heavy machinery faces agricultural headwinds. Logistics is navigating operational challenges, but also exploring AI efficiencies.
watchFor: Major defense spending cuts announced by the US government
Agricultural commodity prices rebound strongly, boosting farmer sentiment
Global trade volumes decline significantly, impacting logistics demand

Healthcare.thesis: The GLP-1 obesity drug wave continues to drive significant growth for leading pharmaceutical companies, while managed care providers show stability. Medical devices face mixed signals.
watchFor: New GLP-1 competitors emerge with superior efficacy or fewer side effects
Regulatory bodies impose stricter pricing controls on pharmaceutical companies
Healthcare plans report unexpected increases in medical loss ratios

Financials.thesis: The financial sector is benefiting from improving net interest margins, strategic financial engineering, and positive analyst sentiment, particularly in credit services and diversified banks.
watchFor: Federal Reserve signals unexpected rate cuts, compressing NIMs
Significant increase in loan defaults or credit card delinquencies
New regulatory pressures on banks or asset managers

Consumer Defensive.thesis: The sector is largely stable, with discount stores maintaining their position. However, rising healthcare costs are a broader concern for consumers, indirectly impacting discretionary spending.
watchFor: Significant downturn in consumer confidence, driving trade-down behavior
Unexpected inflationary pressures on household goods
Strong economic rebound reduces demand for discount retailers

Utilities.thesis: The utilities sector is seeing interest in independent power producers and renewable energy, but no strong overarching narrative is currently driving significant capital flows.
watchFor: Significant policy changes favoring or disfavoring renewable energy
Sharp increase in interest rates, impacting capital-intensive utility projects
Unexpected disruptions to energy supply or demand

Basic Materials.thesis: Rare earth stocks are rallying on news of potential US funding and easing concerns about China's dominance, signaling a positive shift for domestic producers.
watchFor: US government funding for rare earth projects is delayed or reduced
China reasserts dominance or increases export restrictions
Global demand for rare earths unexpectedly declines

Precious Metals.thesis: Precious metals are currently influenced by inflation concerns and geopolitical developments, with gold showing some upward movement. However, no strong, sustained trend is evident.
watchFor: CPI data shows significant and sustained deceleration (<0.2% MoM)
US Dollar strengthens considerably, reducing safe-haven demand
Geopolitical tensions de-escalate, reducing demand for hedges
